# Short Video Agent Kit

Agent-first short-form AI video generation CLI and MCP server for Sora, Gemini Veo, xAI/Grok and Seedance/PiAPI.

Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/short-video-agent-kit
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/short-video-agent-kit
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=short-video-agent-kit -- short-video-agent-kit doctor
MCP command: short-video-mcp

Core tools:
- short_video_agent_manifest
- short_video_connection_status
- short_video_privacy_audit
- short_video_build_payload
- short_video_generate

Safety:
- Dry-run is enabled by default.
- API keys are never returned to agents.
- Paid generation requires live=true or SHORT_VIDEO_DRY_RUN=false.
